The '''Aiqin 4 system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]],<ref name="EAOC" /> and contained the world [[Aiqin 4]].<ref name="XWvTF:BoP" />

==History==
In the Aiqin 4 system, Airam Clan Leader [[Ilay]] repeatedly met with [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces from [[Task Force Vengeance]], namely the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]] [[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']], for negotiations against the wishes of other Clan Leaders. The meetings came under attack at least twice, and during the last meeting, [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] forces [[Battle of Aiqin 4|attacked her ship]] and kidnapped Ilay right under the nose of the Imperial forces.

==Behind the scenes==
"Aiqin 4" is an unusual name for a system, but the mission briefings explicitly name it the "Aiqin 4 system". To denote the fourth planet of a system, Romanic number would have been used instead (i.e. Aiqin '''IV''') but that was not the case in any mission title, briefing or star map throughout the game, where the system is consistently named "Aiqin '''4'''". Despite that, ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' lists the system as "Aiqin".
